# Weather Fit

> Weather Fit is an iOS weather app that answers the everyday question "what should I wear today?" It combines accurate weather forecasts with personalized outfit recommendations through a customizable character that dresses according to current and forecasted conditions. Available on iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, and macOS.

## App

- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/apple-store/id1194408342): Download Weather Fit for iPhone and iPad. Free with optional Premium subscription.

## Website

- [Home](https://weatherfit.com/): Overview of features including outfit recommendations, widgets, character customization, and weather data.

## Social

- [X / Twitter](https://x.com/weatherfitapp)
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/weatherfitapp/)

## Contact

- Support and general inquiries: hi@weatherfit.com
